summary: Built context-compress tool (Shadow Mode) at tools/context-compress. Features: (1) Shadow/enforced modes, (2) Budget check integration, (3) Capsule creation via capsule-builder, (4) Compression event logging, (5) Eviction plan generation. Health check: healthy. Self-test: 6/6 passed. Tool supports --session-id, --state, --history, --capsules, --events, --mode shadow|enforced, --max-tokens, --dry-run, --health, --test.
